dev: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Domung.

dree: verb. To bear or endure (something); to put up with, to suffer, to undergo.

dye: noun. A colorant, especially one that has an affinity to the substrate to which it is applied.

eye: noun. An organ through which animals see (“perceive surroundings via light”).

eyre: noun. A journey taken by certain Medieval English itinerant judges (justices in eyre)

reave: verb. To plunder, pillage, rob, pirate, or remove.
reaved: verb. simple past and past participle of reave
red: noun. The colour of the setting sun, blood, and strawberries; the colour which is evoked by the longest visible wavelengths (between about
ree: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Rejang Kayan.

rev: verb. To increase the speed of a motor, or to operate at a higher speed.
